subcodes.first_line: O servant! Render thanks unto God, inasmuch as He hath once again manifested Himself, that He might disclose unto thee the mysteries in luminous vesture [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد فاشکری الله بما تجلی الله مره اخری لیظهر لک الاسرار فی قمص الدری
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @consolation and comfort
